localizations.title: Robin Hood: Dead or Alive
localizations.hint_1: An arrow is engraved onto this coin. Probably, the work of one of Robin Hood's Merry Men. Make sure it doesn't fall into the wrong hands.
localizations.hint_2_first: There are too many guards. You won't be able to fight them all nor shake them off. You must find a way to block them.
localizations.hint_2: Find a way to drop the portcullis down.
localizations.hint_5: Use the brooch (8) one way then the other to try picking the lock.
localizations.hint_8: This brooch will come in handy in the dungeons.
localizations.hint_10: Robin probably went to the archery tournament (18). Now, you can buy what you need in order to also participate in it.
localizations.hint_11: Literally, look for what is at the very end of the CORRIDOR.
localizations.hint_13: Observe the lute before making any decision...
localizations.hint_14: The minstrel lets you know through his ballad how you can find the Merry Men. But you need only one word from each sentence.
localizations.hint_16: Divide each screen area among the players to avoid getting confused. However, if you can't manage to block the blows in a row, keep trying. Your assailant will eventually get tired and slow down.
localizations.hint_18: Without a bow, you'll never be able to set foot in there.
localizations.hint_23: This key must open something in the Sheriff's bedchamber.
localizations.hint_26: You have something left as a memento of your adventures.
localizations.hint_34_first: Pay attention to the layout of the tombstones.
localizations.hint_34: The tombstones are laid out in the same way as the organ keys (81): the first row represents the 7 white keys, and the second row the 5 black keys.
localizations.hint_39_first: If you cut the tree by the river, you could reach the other side.
localizations.hint_39: Observe the tree's shadow on the water. It forms a blue +7.
localizations.hint_50: Between "here" and Sherwood's entrance, there are 9 options. Take the right card.
localizations.hint_56_first: Some of these symbols are also in the Nottingham coat of arms.
localizations.hint_56: The Nottingham coat of arms is often shown on official documents.
localizations.hint_58:
Robin probably went to the archery tournament (18).
Now, you have enough to pay for a bow to participate in it.
localizations.hint_59: The key for this wardrobe is probably the one the Sheriff (67) firmly holds.
localizations.hint_60: You don't have the silver coin needed to enter Nottingham, but maybe a good bottle will triumph over simple minds.
localizations.hint_64: If you want to buy weapons from this dealer, you must first find some gold.
localizations.hint_66_first: Robin has been locked in the dungeons. It is difficult to access them without being spotted by the guard. Unless it is the guard that takes you there…
localizations.hint_66: Threaten the guard at the entrance of Nottingham (20) with your axe (9). Take card 29.
localizations.hint_67: The Sheriff is sleeping restlessly. You have probably heard about a method for calming down an agitated snorer.
localizations.hint_71: Start by placing the box bottom upright, then position the scene with great precision using the markers (on the back of the Wanted notice). Then, place the characters one by one according to the Merry Men’s plan (98). From left to right: Little John, the executioner, Maid Marian, the Sheriff, Friar Tuck, and the priest. To hit the rope, your arrow must ricochet off an object. To identify it, close one eye and observe the luminous shape in the background. Then get closer to the object to take your shot.
localizations.hint_74: With this bow you will be able to enter the archery tournament.
localizations.hint_77_first: The engravings in the dungeon will help you in finding your path to the exit of the catacombs. The footprints indicate in which direction you must go.
localizations.hint_77: This maze starts at the CHALICE (77). Then move the cards one by one to form the path following the order of the dungeon carvings (24). Pay attention to the layout of the cards.
localizations.hint_78_first: The engravings in the dungeon will help you in finding your path to the exit of the catacombs. The footprints indicate in which direction you must go.
localizations.hint_78: This maze starts at the CHALICE (77). Then move the cards one by one to form the path following the order of the dungeon carvings (24). Pay attention to the layout of the cards.
localizations.hint_81_first: Go for a walk near the tombs in front of the chapel (34) to find musical inspiration.
localizations.hint_81: The tombstones are laid out in the same way as the organ keys (81): the first row represents the 7 white keys, and the second row the 5 black keys. 3 musical notes are needed to open the secret compartment, but which ones?
localizations.hint_84: The lock is a little different from the previous one, but the lock-picking method remains the same.
localizations.hint_90_first: The light passing through the stained-glass windows draws your attention. Have you seen these symbols somewhere before?
localizations.hint_90: A heart, a bird, and an angel. These 3 symbols are also depicted on the tombstones in front of the chapel (34). The layout of these 3 tombstones will be useful in accessing the secret compartment of the organ.
localizations.answer_hint_2: Use Robin's bow (87) to aim and cut the rope holding the portcullis.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Slide the brooch (8) in the lock to pick it. When you insert the brooch to the left, you get 9. When you insert it to the right, you get 6.
localizations.answer_hint_10: Give this gold coin (10) to the weapon dealer (64) to secure a bow.
localizations.answer_hint_11: At the very end of the word CORRIDOR is the letter R.
localizations.answer_hint_13: The lute (13) has an arrow on it which is the same as the arrow engraved on the coin. This man is probably a friend of the Merry Men. Give this minstrel (13) your coin (1) and listen to him sing.
localizations.answer_hint_14: The first words of each line tell you how to find the Merry Men "In Sherwood Remove One To Find The Merry Men." So, subtract 1 from Sherwood (40): 40 - 1 = 39
localizations.answer_hint_16: The important thing is that you tried your best.
localizations.answer_hint_23: Open the Sheriff's wardrobe (59) using this key (23).
localizations.answer_hint_26: Show the Merry Men (26) the broken brooch (36) as proof of your misfortune in the dungeons.
localizations.answer_hint_34: The chapel's stained-glass windows (90) provide 3 symbols that are also shown on the tombstones: a heart, a bird, and an angel. The layout of these tombstones indicate the musical notes you must play on the organ: from left to right, press the 1st black key (C#), 3rd white key (E), then the 4th black note (G#).
localizations.answer_hint_39: If you cut the tree (+7) with your axe (9), you will be able to cross the river.
localizations.answer_hint_50: Find among your cards the only one whose number is between 40 (Sherwood's entrance) and 50 ("here").
localizations.answer_hint_56: Observe the wax seal that is on the Wanted notice. It bears the Nottingham coat of arms: a cross on which 3 crowns are placed. Press the cross button and move the crowns to the same positions as on the coat of arms: the middle one down and the other 2 up.
localizations.answer_hint_58: Maid Marian must be at the archery tournament. This is where Robin probably went.
localizations.answer_hint_60: Try offering this bottle (60) to the guard at the gates of Nottingham (20 or 29). Maybe he will let you pass. Take card 80 or 89.
localizations.answer_hint_66: After you threatened the guard the first time with your axe (29), he threatened to lock you in the dungeon if you were to try again. Threaten him again with your axe (9) to join Robin in the dungeons.
localizations.answer_hint_67: Whistle to try appeasing the Sheriff's sleep and thus retrieve the key.
localizations.answer_hint_71: Once everyone is at their post (98), you are responsible for cutting the rope (78). First, position yourself in the right spot to recreate the scene. But from there, the rope is unfortunately hidden by the beautiful Marian. You must find a way to make the arrow ricochet, but what should you shoot at? Close one eye and observe the luminous shape in the background. This is the inspiration you need for your legendary shot: the Executioner's axe. Now, aim at the Executioner's axe with your bow (87) to make the arrow ricochet until it cuts the rope of the gallows.
localizations.answer_hint_74: Show your bow (74) at the entrance to the archery tournament (18) so that you are allowed to participate.
localizations.answer_hint_77: Go from the CHALICE (77) and place card 78 at a right angle to extend the path to the BONE. Then move card 77 to extend the path to the HELMET. Next, do the same for the SHIELD and finally the exit (SUN) of the catacombs. The pattern created by the movement of the two catacomb maps forms a number 2.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Go from the CHALICE (77) and place card 78 at a right angle to extend the path to the BONE. Then move card 77 to extend the path to the HELMET. Next, do the same for the SHIELD and finally the exit (SUN) of the catacombs. The pattern created by the movement of the two catacomb maps forms a number 2.
localizations.answer_hint_81: The chapel's stained-glass windows (90) provide 3 symbols that are also shown on the tombstones: a heart, a bird, and an angel. The layout of these tombstones indicate the musical notes you must play on the organ: from left to right, press the 1st black key (C#), 3rd white key (E), then the 4th black note (G#).
localizations.answer_hint_84: Slide the brooch (8) in the lock to pick it. When you insert the brooch to the left, you get 3. When you insert it to the right, you get 6.
localizations.answer_hint_90: The tombstones are laid out exactly as the organ keys (81): the first row represents the 7 white keys, and the second row the 5 black keys. The layout of the 3 tombstones (a heart, a bird, and an angel) indicate the musical notes you must play on the organ: from left to right, press the 1st black key (C#), 3rd white key (E), then the 4th black note (G#).
localizations.machine_16: You did great at defending yourself! With a wide smile, the man stops attacking you and starts talking to you enthusiastically. Take card 50.
localizations.machine_56: The passage opens onto a dark maze of tunnels.
localizations.machine_67: Your whistling calms the Sheriff. His hand relaxes, and you retrieve the key gently.
localizations.machine_81: Suddenly the snoring stops. You hear someone approaching ...
localizations.machine_92: Congratulations! You came second in the competition, just behind a man called 'Biron'. The latter, while trying to approach the beautiful Maid Marian, is captured by the guards. Unfortunately, 'Biron' was none other than Robin! It is then your turn to talk to Maid Marian.
localizations.machine_87_rope: You cut the rope that held the portcullis. It falls just in front of the guards, stopping them in their tracks. Hurry towards Sherwood Forest!
localizations.machine_87_guards: There are too many guards! You will not be able to eliminate them all in time. We must find another way to stop them...
localizations.machine_87_endFailed: To hit the rope, your arrow must ricochet off an object. To identify it, close one eye and observe the luminous shape in the background. Then get closer to the object to take your shot.
localizations.players_setup: HOW MANY OF YOU ARE PLAYING?
localizations.machine_56_after: If you wish to save Robin from hanging, you must hurry to join the Merry Men. Quickly find the way through the tunnels to get out of the catacombs.
localizations.hint_67_noMic: The Sheriff is sleeping restlessly. You have probably heard about a method for calming down an agitated snorer.
localizations.answer_hint_67_noMic: Pinch the Sheriff‘s nose to try appeasing the Sheriff's sleep and thus retrieve the key.
localizations.machine_67_noMic: The nose pinch calms the Sheriff. His hand relaxes, and you retrieve the key gently.
localizations.machine_16_intro_instruction_1: Block your assailant's attacks by pressing rapidly on all contact areas that don't contain a skull.
localizations.machine_16_intro_instruction_2: Avoid the skulls; these are your opponent's feints.
localizations.machine_33_intro_instruction_1: To help the Merry Men prepare for their next robbery, observe the convoy closely:
localizations.machine_33_intro_instruction_2: When you are ready, flip the 3 cards over and press the READY? GO! button.
localizations.machine_33_question_1: How many men are there in the convoy?
localizations.machine_33_question_2: How many men are riding horses?
localizations.machine_33_question_4: How many horses are there in total?
localizations.machine_33_question_5: How can you access the cargo inside?
localizations.machine_33_question_6: What is the symbol of this squadron?
localizations.machine_33_question_8: Is there any other loot in addition to the cargo?
localizations.machine_33_question_10_1: 4 are pulling, 1 on the left and 1 on the right
localizations.machine_33_question_10_2: 2 are pulling, 1 on the left and 1 on the right, 2 in the back
localizations.machine_33_question_10_4: 2 are pulling, 2 to the left, and 2 to the right
localizations.machine_33: This convoy has no more secrets for you. Little John will be very happy!
localizations.machine_38_before_description: "One night in prison will teach you a lesson." The guards have confiscated all your personal effects.
localizations.machine_38_before_end1: This unpleasant night made you lose precious time.
localizations.machine_38_before_discard: Put the cards back in the deck.
localizations.machine_38_before_end2: Take the cards put aside, then continue the adventure.
localizations.machine_38_after_description: Don't hold your breath. You aren't going to see the daylight any time soon! But, luckily, you managed to hide the brooch.
localizations.machine_38_after_instructions: DISCARD ALL CARDS EXCEPT THE BROOCH.
localizations.machine_87_end: It is indeed a legendary shot! Your arrow ricochets off the executioner’s axe, then off Friar Tuck’s tankard, and ends its course by cutting the rope clean. Robin is saved! Taking advantage of the ensuing confusion, you flee with the Merry Men to Robin's lair. While waiting for King Richard’s return, you will keep bringing justice throughout England.
localizations.machine_92_intro_instruction_1: To participate, fold the target card in half (or use one of the stands), get closer to the target to recover an arrow, then move back approximately 16 inches.
localizations.machine_92_intro_instruction_3: Aim as best as you can at the center of the target then release. Rank among the best archers.
localizations.machine_92_lastChance_instruction_1: You barely make it to the finals and dispute the title with man named 'Biron'.
